calibration_warning_messages: Since FrozenEstimator does not appear to accept sample_weight, sample weights will only be used for the calibration itself. This can be caused by a limitation of the current scikit-learn API. See the following issue for more details: https://github.com/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/21134. Be warned that the result of the calibration is likely to be incorrect.

sealed_test_contract.existing_attempt_policy: terminal failure; no overwrite, resume, force, or silent rerun
sealed_test_contract.preconditions: clean main, HEAD equals origin/main and expected selection-lock commit, source/manifests/models/code/runtime hashes verified
sealed_test_contract.remote_consumption_policy: evaluate-test atomically creates and pushes this never-reused tag before reading outcomes; an existing tag is terminal
